latestEntry.notes: Week 5 Day 5 of Talk 4. Psychology & Bias focus: Incentive-Caused Bias, Conditioned Reflexes (operant & classical conditioning), Deprival Super-Reaction Tendency. 5 case snapshots: New Coke fiasco, social media algorithm changes, consultant incentive misalignment, Berkshire's tech bubble avoidance, CEO who relied only on investment bankers. Mental Model Drill on Incentive-Caused Bias, 3 reflection questions on advisor incentives, workplace conditioned reflexes, and personal bias patterns.
